Bash(python -c "
import urllib.request, json

BASE = 'http://localhost:8090'

def post\(path, data\):
    req = urllib.request.Request\(BASE + path, data=json.dumps\(data\).encode\(\), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}\)
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=10\) as r:
        return json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)

r = post\('/api/entity/spawn', {'type':'animated','position':{'x':16,'y':2,'z':16},'id':'player'}\)
print\(r\)
" 2>&1)

import urllib.request, json

def post\(path, body\):
    data = json.dumps\(body\).encode\(\)
    req = urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:8090' + path, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}\)
    res = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=10\)
    return res.read\(\).decode\(\)

print\(post\('/api/placed_object/remove', {'id': 'test_chair_2'}\)\)
print\(post\('/api/placed_object/remove', {'id': 'test_chair_3'}\)\)
")

import sqlite3

db = sqlite3.connect\('C:/Users/jack/Documents/PhyxelProjects/CharacterTestbed/worlds/default.db'\)
c = db.cursor\(\)

c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM microcubes'\)
print\('Microcube count:', c.fetchone\(\)[0]\)

c.execute\('SELECT chunk_x, chunk_y, chunk_z, local_x, local_y, local_z, material FROM microcubes LIMIT 10'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\):
    print\('  microcube:', r\)

c.execute\('SELECT * FROM placed_objects'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\):
    print\('  placed_obj id=%s json=%s' % \(r[0], r[1][:300] if r[1] else None\)\)

db.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
db = sqlite3.connect\('C:/Users/jack/Documents/PhyxelProjects/CharacterTestbed/worlds/default.db'\)
c = db.cursor\(\)
c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM microcubes'\)
print\('Microcube count after save:', c.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
c.execute\('SELECT * FROM placed_objects'\)
rows = c.fetchall\(\)
print\('Placed objects in DB:', len\(rows\)\)
for r in rows:
    import json
    objs = json.loads\(r[1]\) if r[1] else []
    print\(f'  {len\(objs\)} objects:', [o.get\(\\"id\\"\) for o in objs]\)
db.close\(\)
")
